name: obp-checkout-orchestration
description: OBP Checkout Orchestrator — Oasis BI Pro Merchant-of-Record (MoR) checkout for the SparkMind ecosystem. Single Duitku merchant code, fan-out to multiple sub-brands.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name obp-checkout-orchestration
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed
